description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the bandresen/alpine-emacs Docker image, with a before_script that runs `cask list` and `make cask`, and an after_script that prints the Emacs version via `emacs --version | head -n 1`. Define two stages, build and test. In the build stage add a make_build job that runs `make build 2>&1 | tee build.log` then checks that no `:Error:` lines appear with `[ $(grep ':Error:' build.log | wc -l) -eq 0 ]`, and publishes the `.cask/` directory and `build.log` as artifacts that expire after 5 minutes. In the test stage add a make_build_warnings job that displays `build.log` with `cat build.log` and asserts no `:Warning:` lines via `[ $(grep ':Warning:' build.log | wc -l) -eq 0 ]`. Also in the test stage add a make_checkdoc job that runs `make checkdoc 2>&1 | tee checkdoc.log` and ensures no `Warning` strings with `[ $(grep 'Warning' checkdoc.log | wc -l) -eq 0 ]`, and a make_test job that simply runs `make test`.
